news.headline: Voltalia has disclosed results of its third employee share plan, with participation from 82% of its workforce.
authID closed $11 million Registered Direct Offering by selling 1,464,965 shares at $7.50 each, with total gross proceeds.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, authID Inc. (NASDAQ: AUID), a top provider of biometric identity verification solutions, completed its Registered Direct Offering by selling 1,464,965 shares of common stock at a price of $7.50 per share (or $8.16 per share for Company directors). The total gross proceeds from the offering reached $11,000,000 million, excluding placement agent fees and other expenses.

news.headline: Novo Nordisk will restrict initial Wegovy sales in China due to high demand. Over half of China's population is overweight or obese.
news.summary: Novo Nordisk A/S (NYSE:NVO) is strategizing to restrict initial sales of its obesity treatment Wegovy in China in order to manage demand effectively amidst global supply challenges. A survey by China’s National Health Commission unveiled that more than half of the country's 1.4 billion citizens are categorized as overweight or obese. Maziar Mike Doustdar, Novo Nordisk’s chief of international operations, expressed the company's intention to introduce Wegovy in China promptly, while emphasizing the importance of maintaining a consistent supply globally. China has recently granted approval for Wegovy, presenting a novel weight loss alternative in a market where Novo Nordisk's older generation weight-loss drug, Saxenda, was linked to reduced bone mass density in a study.

news.headline: PCE inflation report anticipated to reveal minimal to no price rises in the previous month.
GetReal Labs launches to fight malicious content & deepfakes, led by top experts. Headquartered in Calif., founded June 27, 2024.
news.summary: GetReal Labs, headquartered in San Mateo, California, revealed on June 27, 2024, that they have united cutting-edge technology with renowned media forensics and cybersecurity specialists to combat deception. As a global leader in identifying malicious manipulated content and deepfakes, the company aims to provide unparalleled protection.

news.headline: Ronald Mason Jr., JD, to receive 2024 Marie Fielder Medal in Washington, D.C. for educational leadership.
news.summary: In July, Fielding Graduate University will recognize Ronald Mason Jr., JD, an influential figure in education and champion of inclusion, in Washington, DC. Mason, the former president of the University of the District of Columbia (UDC), will receive an award for his contributions.

news.headline: Economist reassures AI bubble concerns, cites semiconductor sell-off by Nvidia Corp. falling over 13%. Market viewed as different due to high-quality leading companies.
news.summary: Market analysts and economists are debating the possibility of an AI bubble bursting akin to the dot-com crash of the early 2000s and the potential economic fallout. Concerns have heightened recently following a semiconductor selloff, notably with Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) experiencing a 13% decline from its peak last week. Chief economist Jeffrey Roach, Ph.D., from LPL Financial, has dismissed bubble fears, highlighting the productivity gains from innovative technologies like AI. Roach believes the current situation differs significantly from the late-1990s tech bubble, citing high-quality companies as a key distinction. For more details, visit the full article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Hampton Inn Louisville Airport finishes $6.2M renovation led by Commonwealth Hotels based in Covington, Kentucky.
news.summary: In a recent update from Covington, Kentucky, Commonwealth Hotels revealed the successful finish of a major renovation project valued at $6.2 million for the Hampton Inn Louisville. The project included extensive upgrades to both the interior and exterior of the hotel.

news.headline: CTP secures €500M unsecured sustainability loan & €500M bond tender offer, diversifying funding sources at 4.7% interest.
news.summary: In Amsterdam, a recent update states that CTP, the largest listed developer, owner, and manager of industrial and logistics properties in Europe based on gross lettable area (GLA), has accomplished a significant milestone. They have secured a 5-year unsecured syndicated sustainability-linked loan facility totaling €500 million. This loan comes with a fixed all-in cost of 4.7%, enabling CTP to enhance its funding streams. Notable collaborators in this endeavor were SMBC Bank EU AG and ING, who served as Global Coordinators and Sustainability Coordinators.

news.headline: CDO Travel & Hospitality Exchange returns for its second year on 11-12 September 2024 at Hilton Syon Park in London, uniting senior data leaders from the travel sector.
news.summary: London, on June 27, 2024, The CDO Travel & Hospitality Exchange, which had a successful debut in 2023, is set to return for its second edition on September 11-12, 2024. The event will take place at the Hilton Syon Park in London, providing a platform for senior data executives in the travel industry to convene. This year, attendees can expect an even larger gathering of professionals from around the globe to exchange insights and network.

news.headline: Opioid settlement at risk as Supreme Court ruling jeopardizes $6B exchange between plaintiffs and Purdue. negotiations ahead.
news.summary: The individuals suing and the corporation have pledged to engage in new negotiations, but the discussions will likely be difficult following a court ruling that invalidated a condition that the Sackler family had demanded in return for $6 billion.

news.headline: Ellucian appoints Kevin Francis as Chief Revenue Officer to drive global growth in higher education sector.
news.summary: Kevin Francis has been appointed as Chief Revenue Officer by Ellucian, a prominent provider of technology solutions for higher education. The announcement was made on June 27, 2024, in Reston, Virginia. Francis, an Enterprise Software Sales Executive, will play a key role in driving global growth for the company and supporting higher education institutions in their efforts to empower student success. This move is aimed at further solidifying Ellucian's position as a leader in the industry and expanding its reach to cater to the needs of an increasing number of institutions worldwide. The appointment of Kevin Francis reflects Ellucian's strategic focus on enhancing sales and revenue generation, as well as strengthening partnerships with educational organizations.

news.headline: The Skin Center expanding with new locations in Dublin and Westlake, Ohio after success in Gahanna and Shaker Heights.
news.summary: After experiencing success with its establishments in Gahanna and Shaker Heights, OH, The Skin Center, a renowned medical spa, is expanding its operations in response to high demand from clients. The new locations in Columbus, Ohio are set to accommodate a growing number of customers seeking exceptional skincare services. This expansion marks a significant milestone for the company as it continues to establish itself as a leading provider in the industry.

news.headline: ArtPrize 2024 sees record registration numbers - over 1,600 artists from 53 countries; event runs Sep 13-28 in Grand Rapids.
news.summary: Grand Rapids, Michigan will host the popular international art competition and cultural event, ArtPrize, from September 13 to 28, 2024. This year's edition will see a significant rise in participation, with a notable increase in both the number of artists and entries compared to previous years.

news.headline: Jack in the Box launches new Mini Chimi Bang Bangs inspired by Marvel's "Deadpool & Wolverine", joining other beloved tiny foods.
news.summary: In San Diego, Jack in the Box, Inc. (NASDAQ: JACK) unveiled a new addition to their menu - Mini Chimi Bang Bangs, to coincide with the release of Marvel Studios’ “Deadpool & Wolverine” on July 26. This limited-time item joins the brand’s popular small options like Tiny Tacos and Mini Churros. The new Mini Chimi Bang Bangs are set to be as flavorful as their counterparts and will be available for order at Jack in the Box.

news.headline: Stellus Private Credit BDC declares $0.50 Q3 2024 dividend, $0.1666 monthly, payable in July, August, September.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Stellus Private Credit BDC revealed that their Board of Trustees approved a monthly dividend of $0.1666 for July, August, and September, summing up to $0.50 per share for the third quarter of 2024.

news.headline: VARs software market to grow at 11% CAGR, segmented by type and application; global opportunity analysis for 2024-2030.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of June 27, 2024, the Value-Added Resellers (VARs) Software Market is undergoing segmentation by type into On-premise and Cloud-based categories, and by application into Large Enterprises and SMEs. The industry forecast for the period of 2024 to 2030 highlights a global opportunity for growth and development within the VARs sector.

news.headline: Gale Literature Resource Center updates to support primary source literacy & critical thinking.  New features include portals, integrations, and curated sets of historical documents. ALA Annual 2024 conference announced enhancements.
news.summary: At the ALA Annual 2024 Conference in San Diego, on June 27, 2024, Gale, a division of Cengage Group, announced significant improvements to Gale Literature. These enhancements include the introduction of new portals, integrations, and carefully curated collections of historical documents. These updates are designed to bolster primary source literacy and promote the development of critical thinking skills.

news.headline: Phyn partners with Amica Insurance to protect homes from water damage; offers leak detection devices to policyholders.
news.summary: Phyn, a prominent provider of intelligent water solutions, has revealed a partnership with Amica Insurance, a top provider of auto, home, and life insurance. This collaboration aims to enhance home protection and reduce water-related damages by providing Amica policyholders access to Phyn's acclaimed range of leak detection devices. Phyn's innovative technology serves to safeguard a residence's plumbing infrastructure, preventing leaks and ensuring its overall water integrity. Moreover, it enables homeowners to practice water conservation and averts potential unnecessary losses.

news.headline: 78% of organizations view AI as a growing risk, despite 50% using it for efficiency. - Business Wire
news.summary: In Los Angeles, AuditBoard released findings from its recent 2024 Digital Risk Report titled "Opportunities and Challenges of the AI Frontier." The report reveals that 78% of organizations are monitoring AI as a growing risk while also integrating it into their operations. Over 50% of surveyed enterprises stated they utilize AI to boost productivity and elevate their digital capabilities. This indicates a significant trend towards embracing AI despite recognizing associated risks, highlighting the industry's shift towards leveraging advanced technologies for strategic advantage.

news.headline: Meptik launches Meptik Studio Pro, a turnkey virtual production studio with Disguise tech, ROE LEDs & support for easy installation.
news.summary: Atlanta-based company Meptik has launched its latest virtual production studio solution, Meptik Studio Pro, featuring a pre-configured Disguise studio control stack, ROE LEDs, camera tracking, creative and technical support, and training all in one package. This comprehensive solution aims to simplify virtual production studio setup, offering creative teams the tools needed to enhance their production quality. Meptik Studio Pro is now available for immediate use and is set to transform the virtual production landscape.

news.headline: Apple is researching cost-effective batteries for iPhones.
Help at Home named one of America's Greatest Workplaces 2024 by Newsweek, based on diversity, culture, work-life balance.
news.summary: Chicago, June 27, 2024- Help at Home, a prominent national provider of personalized in-home care for seniors, has been recognized as one of America's top companies. The ranking considers factors like diversity, culture, work-life balance, and career growth opportunities. This acknowledgment reflects Help at Home's commitment to excellence in providing services to seniors.

news.headline: Connolly Brothers finishes 234,282 SF Ship Hub for Ferguson Enterprises in Taunton, Mass.
news.summary: In Beverly, Massachusetts, on June 27, 2024, Connolly Brothers Inc. finished constructing a massive warehouse spanning 234,282 square feet for Ferguson Enterprises, LLC. The project took place in Taunton and catered to the needs of private commercial, industrial, and institutional clients.

news.headline: Chicago Fire FC announced Jason Derulo to perform post-match show on Aug 31, 2024, after game against Inter Miami CF.
news.summary: Pop/R&B star Jason Derulo is set to entertain fans with a post-match show following the Chicago Fire FC's match against Inter Miami CF on August 31, 2024. The announcement was made by the club today, revealing the exciting event to take place in Chicago. Don't miss out on this musical extravaganza after what is sure to be an exhilarating game. Get ready to groove with Derulo and celebrate this thrilling match day experience.

news.headline: GW Instek introduces ASR-6000 AC/DC Power Supply series in Taipei, delivering high power density for AI and data centers.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Taipei, GW Instek announced the launch of the ASR-6000 series, designed for AI server and data center uses. This new series offers exceptional power density and flexibility. GW Instek, a prominent provider of tailored test solutions, introduced the ASR-6000 Series High-Performance AC/DC Power to cater to the growing demand in this sector. The series boasts cutting-edge capabilities to meet the requirements of modern applications.

news.headline: Chainlink Data Streams now available on Avalanche mainnet with GMX V2, providing low-latency market data access. June 27, 2024.
news.summary: Chainlink's Data Streams service now offers immediate access to fast market data with the support of its reliable infrastructure. The company, based in San Francisco, made the announcement on June 27, 2024. Chainlink is known for its decentralized computing platform, while Avalanche is leading in the same industry. This service ensures low-latency market data access for users.

news.headline: KAYAK for Business enhances services for SMBs with new features, $20 per trip fee, trip management, flexible payment, and 24/7 support.
news.summary: KAYAK, a prominent travel search engine, has unveiled enhanced features tailored for small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs). These include trip organization tools, adaptable payment options, round-the-clock support from travel agents, and additional benefits. For a flat rate of $20 per trip, businesses can access these services. This development was announced on June 27, 2024, from Stamford, Connecticut.

news.headline: JFK's New Terminal One issues $2.55 billion Green Bond, largest ever for airport project financing.
news.summary: In Jamaica, New York, the new Terminal One at John F. Kennedy International Airport has recently completed a groundbreaking Green Bond issuance totaling $2.55 billion. This marks the highest amount ever raised through a municipal bond for an airport initiative. The funds from the 2024 Series bonds will be utilized for various purposes, including...

news.headline: IPG merges data, engineering, tech: CEO Jarrod Martin oversees Acxiom. Salesforce specialist RafterOne aligned with Acxiom.
news.summary: Jarrod Martin, CEO of KINESSO Global, has expanded his responsibilities to include oversight of Acxiom. Additionally, the Salesforce specialist RafterOne has formed a strategic alignment with Acxiom. This move brings together key players in the industry and promises enhanced collaboration. The number of companies involved in this development is three: KINESSO Global, Acxiom, and RafterOne. Jarrod Martin's new oversight includes managing multiple companies within the group, indicating growth and diversification in the market. The strategic alignment between RafterOne and Acxiom signifies a significant partnership aimed to bring about mutual benefits and further innovation. This collaboration demonstrates a shift towards stronger industry connections and potential for increased market influence.

news.headline: Boussard & Gavaudan Holding Ltd announces interim financial report in Euros.
Money B drops NFT track 'Sit Next to Me' with Guapdad 4000 on Gala Music, embracing Web3. #hiphop #legend #newmusic
news.summary: Rap icon Money B has just dropped an exclusive NFT track titled 'Sit Next to Me,' featuring Guapdad 4000, on Gala Music platform. This move marks Money B's foray into Web3 technology, where digital assets are created and traded. This newly released track is expected to open up new opportunities for fans and collectors to engage with the music industry in a unique way. Don't miss out on this groundbreaking release!

news.headline: TRUFF releases new Buffalo Sauce, elevating classic American sauce offerings. Los Angeles, June 27, 2024.
news.summary: Introducing a modern take on a traditional American condiment, LOS ANGELES, 27th June 2024 - Renowned truffle brand TRUFF has unveiled their latest innovative product - TRUFF Buffalo Sauce. This new hot sauce offering promises to deliver a vibrant and delicious twist on a classic favorite.

news.headline: Boussard & Gavaudan Holding Ltd (GBP) issued a statement on interim financial reporting.
Ram named #1 brand in J.D. Power Initial Quality Study, topping truck-exclusive brands for fourth time in five years.
news.summary: In Auburn Hills, Michigan on June 27, 2024, it was reported that Ram became the only truck-exclusive brand to rank as the top-performing Mass Market brand in a renowned benchmarking study. This marks the fourth time in the last five years that Ram has secured a position among the top three brands in the industry, with two of those instances being at the number one spot. Notably, the Ram 1500 was recognized as the best Full-size Light-Duty truck in this study.

news.headline: Heroku joins CNCF as Platinum Member, showcasing commitment to cloud native innovation. (Chars: 93)
news.summary: A prominent figure in Platform as a Service and an early adopter of cloud-native concepts, Heroku showcases a substantial dedication to cloud-native advancements. The announcement was made in San Francisco on June 27, 2024. The Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF), renowned for fostering cloud ecosystems, plays a pivotal role in this initiative.

news.headline: Dow Jones rises, Micron stock falls post earnings. GDP, jobless claims impact. Market updates on Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones saw a turnaround, moving higher following the release of the GDP and jobless claims data. In contrast, Micron stock experienced a significant drop in value after reporting its earnings. The Dow Jones index posted a gain of [specific number] points, a positive shift amidst the market fluctuations. This news update highlights the impact of economic indicators on market movements, underscoring the importance of such data for investors.

news.headline: Major indexes rise with Dow Jones acting weakest. Nvidia falls in sympathy with Micron on stock market today.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones Industrial Average showed the lowest performance among the major stock market indexes. Nvidia shares dropped alongside Micron. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq, however, experienced gains. This data was reported in an article titled "Dow Jones, S&P 500, Nasdaq Higher As Nvidia Falls With Micron" on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Canacol Energy Ltd. reveals meeting results: 7 directors elected, PricewaterhouseCoopers appointed auditors.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on June 27, 2024, Canacol Energy Ltd. (TSX:CNE) (OTCQX:CNNEF) (BVC:CNEC) announced the outcomes of its annual general meeting in Bogotá, Colombia. Shareholders elected Charle Gamba, Michael Hibberd, Francisco Diaz, Gustavo Gattass, Valentina Garbarini, Silvestre Tovar Leopardi, and David Winter to the Board of Directors. Additionally, PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP was appointed as Canacol's auditors.

news.headline: Only 8% of organizations fully realize cloud benefits with standardized shared services, as per HashiCorp survey.
news.summary: Approximately 8% of companies are effectively capitalizing on the business advantages of their cloud investments by implementing standardized shared services.

news.headline: Chainlink data now active on Avalanche Network. GMX, a futures trading platform, to utilize Chainlink tech for decentralized futures exchange.
news.summary: A perpetual futures trading platform called GMX has announced a partnership with Chainlink to support its decentralized futures exchange. GMX will utilize Chainlink's technology for this collaboration.

news.headline: 30-year fixed-rate mortgage averages 6.86 percent, continuing downward trend. Freddie Mac survey results released.
news.summary: Freddie Mac, based in McLean, VA, reported on June 27, 2024, that the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) had an average of 6.86 percent as per its Primary Mortgage Market Survey® (PMMS®).

news.headline: 30-yr fixed mortgages in US drop slightly to 6.86% on June 27 from 6.87%, lowest since early April - Freddie Mac.
BlockQuarry Corp. partners with Hawkeye Industrial Services to advance AI operations and data processing solutions.
news.summary: Partnership aims to enhance AI operations and localized data processing solutions through joint efforts. The collaboration focuses on leveraging expertise to drive innovation in the field. This initiative involves a team of [number] professionals and specialists working together to develop cutting-edge technologies. The ultimate goal is to create more efficient and effective processes, with a particular focus on enhancing data security and optimizing performance. Stay tuned for updates on the progress of this collaborative venture.

news.headline: RNL and Six Red Marbles join forces for higher education design, content, and media. Announced on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: In an announcement made on June 27, 2024, it was revealed that Ruffalo Noel Levitz (RNL), a prominent higher education services provider, has joined forces with Six Red Marbles. This partnership aims to combine Six Red Marbles' extensive expertise in course design, content development, and media creation with RNL's graduate and online enrollment solutions. Headquartered in CEDAR RAPIDS, Iowa, this collaboration is set to enhance the services offered by both companies. This strategic move brings together RNL's established position in the industry with Six Red Marbles' proven track record, creating a comprehensive solution for clients.

news.headline: ShowMeCables introduces new 23-inch-wide server racks, including 4-post and 2-post floor racks and 2-post wall racks.
news.summary: ShowMeCables, a brand under Infinite Electronics and a provider of wired and wireless connectivity products, recently launched a new collection of server racks. This line consists of 4-Post and 2-Post floor racks, as well as 2-Post wall racks. The racks are designed to accommodate 23-inch-wide servers in an open-frame setup. This release took place on June 27, 2024, in Irvine, California.

news.headline: Beyond Capital Ventures appoints Nicholas Java as partner to provide more than just capital to founders in emerging markets. Nairobi, Kenya, June 27, 2024.
news.summary: A leading venture capital firm, Beyond Capital Ventures (BCV), based in Nairobi, Kenya, made headlines on June 27, 2024, by appointing Nicholas Java as a Partner. This move signifies BCV's commitment to supporting founders in emerging markets with more than just financial backing. The firm aims to provide comprehensive support to entrepreneurs in these regions.

news.headline: Florida Tobacco Shop releases "Cigar Tips for Beginners" guide, providing essential tips for novice smokers.
news.summary: Before smoking their first cigar, beginner cigar enthusiasts should be aware of important tips. Released by Florida Tobacco Shop from Doral, Fla. on June 27, 2024, the latest resource titled "Cigar Tips for Beginners" provides valuable insights. This guide contains essential information for novice cigar smokers and aims to enhance their smoking experience. By following the tips outlined in this resource, beginners can make informed choices about selecting, storing, and smoking cigars. This valuable resource includes tips on cigar maintenance, cutting techniques, storing cigars, and more. It is a must-read for individuals looking to explore the world of cigars and improve their smoking skills.

news.headline: Canela Media reveals 'Verano de Gloria' lineup on Canela.TV, showcasing sports, movies, music, and children's content for a summer celebration.
news.summary: "Canela Media, a top Hispanic multicultural media company specializing in technology and innovation, has unveiled 'Canela Verano.' The Summer celebration features exclusive sports coverage, Mexican movie classics, music content, and children's programming. This announcement was made on June 27, 2024, in New York. Canela Verano is set to offer a diverse range of content to entertain audiences during the Summer months."

news.headline: Flaharty Asset Management appoints Melissa Robinson as COO & CCO, with over two decades of industry experience.
news.summary: Flaharty Asset Management, a leading financial services firm focused on delivering customized solutions for clients, has appointed Melissa Robinson as Chief Operating Officer & Chief Compliance Officer. With more than 20 years of experience in the industry, Robinson will play a key role in overseeing and ensuring compliance within the company's operations.
